title: AliExpress hit with record $629 million fine for selling counterfeit and illegal products - Engadget
summary: Investigators found millions of counterfeit products, unsafe toys and dangerous cosmetics. Investigators found "millions" of counterfeit products, unsafe toys and dangerous cosmetics on sale even after being flagged.
